fix_hypothesis: The item-7 docs artifact is already lawful as written: it selects exactly one continue-bounded end-state from the accepted item-4/item-5/item-6 ledger, keeps P2 and P5 explicitly unresolved, and limits the handoff to one planning-only P5 successor gate.
evidence_summary: Approved as a docs-only item-7 decision only: the new artifact uses the accepted item-4 readiness contract plus the accepted item-5 and item-6 aggregate classifications as its full ledger, evaluates exactly the three lawful end-states, selects only continue-bounded, keeps repo-level readiness blocked by unresolved P2 and P5, rejects boundary revision as weaker than bounded continuation on the current evidence, and limits the next move to one planning-only P5 successor gate.
